overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city street. The player moves from an open sunlit boulevard past construction barriers into covered walkways with Asian-inspired architecture, finally reaching an intersection with an elevated highway overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial boulevard with construction barriers

events.description: futuristic black sedan drives past on the right side of the street
green sports car speeds by followed by a red sedan

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past construction barriers and holographic billboards

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the street
person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the distance

entered.detail: orange and white striped construction barriers lining the left sidewalk edge
large blue and red billboard with 'CIRRUS COLA' text and star logo
teal colored vertical billboard with 'MILITECH' text
yellow temporary barriers separating sidewalk from the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit futuristic city street with construction barriers lining the left side. The camera moves forward past holographic billboards including a prominent Cirrus Cola advertisement while futuristic vehicles drive past on the right. The architecture mixes modern glass towers with industrial scaffolding.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with Asian-inspired architecture and neon signage

events.description: entering covered walkway under overhead awnings and scaffolding
passing under red paper lanterns creating colored light patterns

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arcade section with shops and neon signs on the left

notable_agents.action: person in orange vest walking toward the camera
person walking away in the distance under the awnings

entered.detail: metal and fabric awning covering the walkway creating shade and partial cover
traditional red Japanese-style paper lanterns hanging from the overhead structure
yellow banner with 'ALL FOODS' text spanning across the street ahead
neon blue arrow sign with 'Barely Legal' text pointing left

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered pedestrian walkway sheltered by overhead awnings. Red paper lanterns hang on the left while neon signs illuminate the shops. The camera passes under an 'All Foods' banner and approaches a 'Barely Legal' neon sign as the walkway narrows.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with elevated highway overpass and steam vents

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open intersection area with visible overpass
turning right at the street corner near the building with green shutters

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, crossing the street, and turning right at the corner past pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of two people standing and conversing at the street corner
purple car driving on the road under the overpass

entered.detail: large concrete and metal elevated highway structure with green framework and multiple levels
white steam rising from street vents near the intersection creating atmospheric haze
corner building with green metal shutters, red paper lanterns, and a circular sign
concrete retaining wall with colorful graffiti under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into a wide intersection dominated by a massive elevated highway overpass. Steam rises from street vents as the camera approaches the crosswalk, turns right at the corner, and passes a building with green shutters and hanging red lanterns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open futuristic boulevard into a sheltered neon district and finally toward a massive urban intersection. It begins on a sunlit street lined with construction barriers, moving past holographic Cirrus Cola billboards and glass towers as futuristic vehicles stream by. As the camera advances, the open air gives way to a covered pedestrian walkway where the light shifts to the glow of neon signs and red paper lanterns hanging beneath overhead awnings. The scene then expands as the camera emerges from the narrow passage into a wide intersection dominated by a towering elevated highway overpass. Finally, the camera glides through rising steam from street vents, turning right at the corner past a building with green shutters and hanging lanterns.
